sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this title

special_mechanics.name: Skateboarding
special_mechanics.description: Player character (Radical Rex) moves on a skateboard as primary locomotion method

physics_values.noted_behavior: skateboard goes so fast players often miss power-ups and jumps

special_mechanics.name: Roar Attack
special_mechanics.description: Special ability that kills or hurts all enemies on screen

special_mechanics.name: Fire Breath
special_mechanics.description: Special ability to temporarily immobilize enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative). No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game criticized for skateboard speed being too fast, causing players to miss platforming elements. Noted as having straightforward platforming with cheap obstacles and frustrating difficulty spikes in boss encounters.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Radical Rex (gameplay section, reception reviews from GamePro and Next Generation)
The Cutting Room Floor - Radical Rex (SNES)
